metadata.title: Infrastructure Performance Audit — Config Architecture + Parallel Launch + SWAG Optimization
metadata.priority: P0 — blocks 6th pass launch (won't launch until config architecture is right)

root-causes.cause: ~/.sky/config.yaml had cloud:runpod for GCP jobs. Cross-cloud SSH added ~30 min/submission. RunPod outage killed 25/34 submissions. FIX: controller.cloud derived from task YAML cloud, not hardcoded.
run_factorial.sh launches sky jobs one-at-a-time. With N=4 parallel, 34 jobs complete submissions in ~45 min instead of ~20 hours. FIX: Configurable parallelism from Hydra config (not hardcoded).

cause.title: SWAG runs 10 epochs regardless of training epochs

root-causes.cause: Debug run: 2 training epochs + 10 SWAG epochs = 25 min SWAG on 5 min training. SWAG swa_epochs should scale: min(config, max(2, max_epochs // 5)). FIX: Scale SWAG proportionally to training epochs.

Zero perf/* metrics logged. Cannot measure Docker pull time, DVC pull time, setup overhead, SWAG overhead, or submission latency programmatically. FIX: Add perf/* metric keys to MLflow, queryable via DuckDB.

phase.name: Config Architecture
phase.description: Create repo-level Hydra config groups for cloud infrastructure. Single source of truth: configs/cloud/{env}.yaml defines provider, controller, accelerators, parallelism, and Docker registry. No more ~/.sky/config.yaml drift.

task.title: Enhance configs/cloud/gcp_spot.yaml with controller + infrastructure blocks
task.spec: Add controller: {cloud: gcp, disk_size: 50} and infrastructure: {parallel_submissions: 4, rate_limit_seconds: 5}. Provider field must be "gcp". Controller cloud must equal provider.

task.title: Enhance configs/cloud/runpod_dev.yaml with controller + infrastructure blocks
task.spec: Add controller: {cloud: runpod, disk_size: 50} and infrastructure: {parallel_submissions: 2, rate_limit_seconds: 5}.

task.title: Add infrastructure block to configs/experiment/debug_factorial.yaml
task.spec: Add infrastructure: {cloud_config: gcp_spot, skypilot_yaml: deployment/skypilot/train_factorial.yaml}. Parallel_submissions NOT set here (inherited from cloud config).

task.title: Create scripts/sync_sky_config.py
task.spec: Reads configs/cloud/*.yaml controller block, writes ~/.sky/config.yaml. Preserves existing non-controller settings. Called by run_factorial.sh before any sky jobs launch. Idempotent.

task.title: Config chain validation test suite
task.spec: tests/v2/unit/config/test_controller_cloud_match.py — parametrized over all cloud configs tests/v2/unit/config/test_factorial_infra_references.py — valid references tests/v2/unit/config/test_cloud_config_schema.py — required keys present tests/v2/unit/config/test_no_hardcoded_parallelism.py — no PARALLEL=4 in scripts

phase.name: Parallel Submissions
phase.description: Modify run_factorial.sh to read parallel_submissions from config chain and launch N jobs concurrently using bash background jobs + wait.

task.title: Read parallel_submissions from config chain in run_factorial.sh
task.spec: Resolution order: factorial.infrastructure.parallel_submissions > cloud.infrastructure.parallel_submissions > fallback 1. Use Python one-liner to extract (no hardcoded values).

task.title: Implement parallel launch loop in run_factorial.sh
task.spec: Replace sequential loop with background job pool. At most N concurrent sky jobs launch calls. wait -n to detect completion. Rate limit between batches. Capture all job IDs including from parallel processes.
task.test: Factorial dry-run with --parallel 4 produces same conditions as sequential

task.title: Call sync_sky_config.py at start of run_factorial.sh
task.spec: Before any sky jobs launch, derive cloud config from factorial YAML, call sync_sky_config.py to ensure ~/.sky/config.yaml matches. Print controller cloud in the launch banner.

phase.name: SWAG Epoch Scaling
phase.description: Fix SWAG swa_epochs to scale proportionally to training epochs. Current: always 10. Fix: min(config, max(2, max_epochs // 5)). This reduces debug SWAG from 25 min to ~5 min.

task.title: RED: test SWAG epochs scale with training epochs
task.spec: test_swag_epochs_scale_with_training: when max_epochs=2, swag should use at most 2 swa_epochs (not 10). When max_epochs=50, can use up to 10.

task.title: GREEN: Scale swa_epochs in post_training_subflow or SWAGPlugin
task.spec: In the code path that determines swa_epochs, apply: actual_swa_epochs = min(configured_swa_epochs, max(2, max_epochs // 5)) Read max_epochs from the config dict passed to post_training_subflow.

phase.name: Performance Instrumentation
phase.description: Add perf/* metric keys to MLflow for every job phase. Enables data-driven optimization and regression detection. See: docs/planning/cloud-performance-measurement-optimization-plan.md

task.title: Add perf/* metric keys to MetricKeys class
task.spec: Add to src/minivess/observability/metric_keys.py: perf/setup_total_seconds, perf/docker_pull_seconds, perf/dvc_pull_seconds, perf/training_seconds, perf/swag_seconds, perf/swag_overhead_ratio, perf/gpu_utilization_fraction, perf/total_job_seconds

task.title: Instrument setup timing in train_factorial.yaml
task.spec: Add timing markers to setup script sections (DVC pull, HF download, GPU check). Write timing to a /tmp/setup_timing.json file that train_flow.py reads and logs to MLflow.

task.title: Instrument SWAG timing in train_flow.py
task.spec: Wrap post_training_subflow call with time.monotonic() measurement. Log perf/swag_seconds and perf/swag_overhead_ratio to MLflow.

task.title: Performance budget regression tests
task.spec: test_swag_overhead_ratio_under_2x: SWAG time / training time <= 2.0 test_setup_fraction_under_40_percent: setup / total <= 0.4 These read from MLflow after a real cloud run (cloud tier tests).

execution-order.step: Phase 1 (Config Architecture) — MUST complete before any launch
Phase 2 (Parallel Submissions) — requires Phase 1 config chain
Phase 3 (SWAG Scaling) — independent, can parallelize with Phase 2
Phase 4 (Performance Instrumentation) — can start after Phase 1
Docker rebuild + GAR push (after all code changes)
